title: Atlas Adventure Hook (High / Natural / Techno)
note: A genre-flavored adventure seed drawn from the three Atlases. Use when the created world leans into a High/Natural/Techno register; pair with villain_drive.json and the relevant data/atlas/<atlas>.json toolkit.

entries.value: HIGH: a fallen sky-realm crashes to the earth, its relics and survivors coveted by rival powers
HIGH: a Zero Power awakens in someone who was never meant to wield it
NATURAL: a beloved wilderness is dying, and its spirit begs the heroes for aid
NATURAL: two communities feud over a sacred natural site or a scarce resource
TECHNO: a corporation's experiment breaks containment in a crowded city
TECHNO: a node of the soul-network / an AI goes rogue and starts gathering followers
CROSS: a relic of the old world blurs the line between magic and machine
CROSS: refugees flee a genre-defining catastrophe — a cataclysm, a blight, or a meltdown
A named Atlas villain makes a move — roll villain_drive.json and build them with statgen.py villain
A wondrous discovery: an Atlas artifact or rare material surfaces, and it comes with a price
